properties.summary: BA phase complete for Transcrib. Covers 2 ProcessGroups, 6 BusinessProcesses (3 decomposed), 6 BusinessEntities, 2 Roles, 27 GlossaryTerms, 21 BusinessRules (19 hard / 2 soft). Validation L1-L8 passed. Produces 9 UC candidates and 6 SA module proposals. 3 open questions deferred to SA.
properties.sa_modules: [{"module":"Ingestion","description":"Upload, validation, chunked transfer, object storage write, transcription job dispatch","source_bp":["BP-001"]},{"module":"TranscriptionPipeline","description":"ASR worker, audio extraction, diarization, speaker-name resolution from dialogue context, transcript persistence","source_bp":["BP-002"]},{"module":"ProtocolGeneration","description":"LLM orchestration, prompt template management/versioning, response parsing, protocol persistence","source_bp":["BP-004"]},{"module":"ProtocolEditing","description":"Markdown editor UI, protocol versioning, save/discard","source_bp":["BP-005"]},{"module":"ExportDelivery","description":"Transcript download endpoint, PDF rendering and delivery","source_bp":["BP-003","BP-006"]},{"module":"MeetingStatus","description":"Cross-cutting Meeting lifecycle status aggregation and UI display (polling or push)","source_bp":["BP-001","BP-002","BP-004"]}]
properties.uc_candidates: [{"id":"UC-001","label":"Upload video and create meeting","source":["BP-001"]},{"id":"UC-002","label":"Transcribe audio with diarization","source":["BP-002 S01-S07"]},{"id":"UC-003","label":"Resolve speaker names in transcript","source":["BP-002-S07B"]},{"id":"UC-004","label":"Generate meeting protocol via LLM","source":["BP-004 happy path"]},{"id":"UC-005","label":"Handle transcription and protocol failures","source":["BP-002-S09","BP-004-S10"]},{"id":"UC-006","label":"View and download transcript","source":["BP-003"]},{"id":"UC-007","label":"Review and edit protocol in Markdown editor","source":["BP-005"]},{"id":"UC-008","label":"Export protocol as PDF","source":["BP-006"]},{"id":"UC-009","label":"Display meeting processing status","source":["cross-cutting: BP-001-S07, BP-002-S08/S09, BP-004-S09/S10"]}]
properties.open_questions: [{"id":"OQ-1","question":"Speaker-name resolution sequencing: must BP-002-S07B complete before BP-004 fires, or can protocol generation start with anonymous labels and names be resolved post-hoc? Affects UC-003 timing and TranscriptionPipeline module boundary."},{"id":"OQ-2","question":"Failure retry strategy (BRQ-019, BP-002-S09, BP-004-S10): manual user-triggered retry vs. automatic with back-off? Determines whether UC-005 needs UI controls or is informational-only."},{"id":"OQ-3","question":"Protocol versioning model (BRQ-014/015): append-only immutable versions vs. in-place overwrite with single prior snapshot? Drives SA domain model for Protocol and impacts UC-007 (edit) and UC-008 (export which version?)."},{"id":"OQ-4","question":"Tech stack still TBD (EXT-02 ASR vendor, EXT-03 LLM provider, EXT-04 storage, PDF rendering). To be decided in /nacl-sa-architect."}]
